summary: List Filter Options for Current Revision
description: Returns all Filter Options for Current Revision defined for the project

key.description:
Key is the value (usually an ID) passed in as the filter param
*Current Revision's key is a boolean value denoting whether to display just the current revisions or not

value.description:
Value is the name/description of the value being filtered on
*Current Revision's value is a boolean value denoting whether to display just the current revisions or not
